name: taches-principled
description: Principle-based plugin ecosystem for Claude Code — planning, execution, evaluation, and development skills.

plugins.name: taches-principled
plugins.description: Core: principle-based skills for the full development lifecycle — plan, execute, author, review, analyze, improve, ideate, implement, document, and refine. 16 skills with decision routers.

plugins.name: tp-sadd
plugins.description: Structured agent-driven development with meta-judge verification — single/competitive/sequential/parallel execution, sub-agent dispatch, and multi-perspective judging.

plugins.name: tp-fpf
plugins.description: First Principles Framework — query knowledge, manage evidence freshness, reconcile with code changes, and run full hypothesis cycles for auditable decisions.

plugins.name: tp-git
plugins.description: Git workflow automation — issue management, conventional commits, PR creation, inline PR reviews, git notes, and worktree-based parallel development.

plugins.name: tp-tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development — strict red-green-refactor, retroactive coverage for existing code, and test repair after logic changes.

plugins.name: tp-ddd
plugins.description: DDD development practices — code-transparency (visible behavior), code-architecture (layered structure, FCIS, early returns, file limits), and code-quality (domain naming, library-first, typed errors). 4 modes answering: what does it do, how to structure, is it idiomatic.

plugins.name: tp-force-multiplier
plugins.description: Hook-driven coaching plugin — steers Claude to use subagents and skills via real-time semantic coaching. Hooks only, no skills.

plugins.name: tp-vps-governance
plugins.description: VPS governance plugin for Claude Code — config auditing and memory curation. Two focused skills for headless VPS operations.
